memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography of Muriel aka de Monte Canisio Valoignes 1088 - 1160.
memoryArtifacts.description:
Muriel de Valoignes was the daughter of Pierre de Valoignes [Petri de Valoniis], who died between 1121/29, and possibly his known wife, Albreda —.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel de Valoignes於1087年出生在法國諾門迪曼其瓦洛斯時，她的父親Peter Piers De Valognes39歲，母親Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur35歲。她和Hubert de Munchensy至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她於1121年在英國諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利被列為nun。她去世於1149年在法國諾門迪享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriel de Valoignes于1087年出生在法国諾門迪曼其瓦洛斯时，她的父亲Peter Piers De Valognes39岁，母亲Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur35岁。她和Hubert de Munchensy至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她于1121年在英国諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利被列为nun。她去世于1149年在法国諾門迪享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel de Valoignes was born in 1087, in Valognes, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Peter Piers De Valognes, was 39 and her mother, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, was 35. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Hubert de Munchensy. In 1121, her occupation is listed as nun in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England. She died in 1149, in Normandy, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel de Valoignes est née en 1087, à Valognes, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Peter Piers De Valognes, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Hubert de Munchensy. En 1121, la profession de sa indiquée est nun à Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1149, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel de Valoignes 1087 in Valognes, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Piers De Valognes 39 und ihre Mutter Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur 35. Sie hatte mit Hubert de Munchensy mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1121 ist ihr Beruf als nun in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Sie starb 1149 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel de Valoignes è nata il nel 1087 nel Valognes, Manche, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Peter Piers De Valognes, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Hubert de Munchensy. Nel 1121, la sua occupazione è indicata come nun nel Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England. Morì nel 1149, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Muriel de Valoignesが1087年にフランスノーマンディマンチェヴァログンスで生まれた時，父Peter Piers De Valognesは39歳，母Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveurは35歳であった。彼女はHubert de Munchensyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1121年，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードスエトフォード プリオリーでの職業はnunと記録されている。彼女は1149年にフランスノーマンディで62歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードスエトフォード プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 드 압잉던 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Muriel de Valoignes(이)가 1087년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 발그네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Piers De Valognes(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Hubert de Munchensy(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1121년, 그녀의 직업은 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드 테트퍼드 플리오리에서 nun이었다. 그녀는 1149년 프랑스 노먼디에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드 테트퍼드 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel de Valoignes nasceu em 1087, em Valognes, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Peter Piers De Valognes, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Hubert de Munchensy. Em 1121, sua profissão aparece como nun em Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1149, em Normandie, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: олд абингдон эбби, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel de Valoignes родилась в 1087 г. в местности валогнесь, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Peter Piers De Valognes было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Hubert de Munchensy. В 1121 году она работала по профессии nun в местности тетфорд приори, тетфорд, норфолк, Англия. Она умерла в 1149 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности тетфорд приори, тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muriel de Valoignes nació en 1087, en Valognes, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Peter Piers De Valognes, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Hubert de Munchensy. En 1121, su ocupación registrada era nun en Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió en 1149, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
